top_signals.title: GameStop Board Asks Shareholders to Increase Share Count
top_signals.summary: GameStop Corp. is asking shareholders to approve a massive increase in its authorized share count as the video-game retailer pursues an acquisition of eBay Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Yubari melons fetch record ¥5.8 million at first auction of season
top_signals.summary: The melons will go on display at Keio Store's Sakuragaoka supermarket in western Tokyo before tasting events begin next week.
